system.description:
A heart-shaped shield 2' across and 3' tall. In hand: +1 AC (dismounted, except when vulnerable; mounted, to self or mount, alternating each move). Strapped on the back: +1 AC against attacks from behind (no Specialization bonus). 1 stone.

Judges Journal optional shield rules (pp. 407–408). Enable the shield-variant overlay to apply the type-specific rules; otherwise it behaves as a standard +1 AC shield.
